title: Notes for Users of EPSON RC+ 7.x or Earlier Versions
description:
Notes for Users of EPSON RC+ 7.x or Earlier Versions

Notes for Users of EPSON RC+ 7.x or Earlier Versions

Epson RC+ 8.0 is only compatible with projects created with EPSON RC+ 7.0.

For EPSON RC+ 7.0

EPSON RC+ 7.0 is compatible with Epson RC+ 8.0.

Projects created with EPSON RC+7.0 are saved to the following location.

"\EpsonRC70\projects" directory

From the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Project] - [Import Project] to import project files for use.

For SPEL for Windows and EPSON RC+ 6.0 or earlier versions

Use EPSON RC+ 7.0 to convert the project file to an Epson RC+ 8.0-compatible EPSON RC+ 7.0 project.

From
	 the EPSON RC+ 7.0 menu, select [Project] - [Import Project] to import
	 a SPEL for Windows or Epson RC+ 6.0 or earlier project.

From
	 the EPSON RC+ 7.0 menu, select [Project] - [Save Project] to save
	 the project.

	Imported projects are saved to the following location.

	"/EpsonRC70/projects " directory

From
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Project] - [Import Project] to import
	 and use an EPSON RC+ 7.0 project file.

For details of EPSON RC+7.0, refer to following.

EPSON RC+ 7.0 Users Guide
